prompt: On my 'Weekly grocery run' to-do, check off Eggs and add 'Sparkling water' to the end of the list.
paraphrases: My grocery-run to-do: mark the Eggs item done and append a new checklist entry for Sparkling water.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMChecklistItem c JOIN TMTask t ON c.task=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Weekly grocery run' AND c.title='Eggs' AND c.status=3
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMChecklistItem c JOIN TMTask t ON c.task=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Weekly grocery run' AND c.title='Sparkling water' AND c.status=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMChecklistItem c JOIN TMTask t ON c.task=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Weekly grocery run'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMChecklistItem c JOIN TMTask t ON c.task=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Weekly grocery run' AND c.title='Milk' AND c.status=0

pseudoScript: U=$(things search "Weekly grocery run" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid'); things todo checklist "$U" --check Eggs; things todo checklist "$U" --add "Sparkling water"
